name: To PRD
description_en: Turn the current conversation into a PRD and publish it to your project issue tracker — no interview, just synthesis of what you've already discussed.
description_zh: 把当前对话直接整理成一份 PRD 并发布到你项目的 issue 追踪器——不做访谈，只综合你们已经讨论过的内容。
long_en: One skill from Matt Pocock's skills collection (this entry installs only the skills/engineering/to-prd folder, not the whole repo). It synthesizes the current conversation and codebase understanding into a PRD (problem statement, extensive user stories, implementation and testing decisions, preferring a single high test seam), confirms the seams with you, then publishes the document to your issue tracker with a ready-for-agent label.
long_zh: Matt Pocock 技能合集中的一个技能（本条目只安装 skills/engineering/to-prd 这一个目录，而非整仓）。它把当前对话与对代码库的理解综合成一份 PRD（问题陈述、详尽的用户故事、实现与测试决策，并优先选用单一的高层测试接缝），与你确认这些接缝后，再把文档发布到你的 issue 追踪器并打上 ready-for-agent 标签。
sec_note_en: This skill publishes a PRD to your configured project issue tracker (GitHub, Linear, or local files) and applies a triage label, so it needs write access there and will create content. It reads your codebase, CONTEXT.md, and ADRs to draft the PRD; tracker vocabulary must be set up beforehand.
sec_note_zh: 该技能会把一份 PRD 发布到你配置的项目 issue 追踪器（GitHub、Linear 或本地文件）并打上分诊标签，因此需要对其的写入权限，并会创建内容。它会读取你的代码库、CONTEXT.md 和 ADR 来起草 PRD；需事先配置好追踪器术语。
